name: Ucore Rare Metals Inc.
description: Ucore Rare Metals Inc. is a Canadian mining and technology company focused on the development of rare earth element (REE) resources and advanced separation technologies. The company's primary asset is the Bokan-Dotson Ridge Rare Earth Project in Alaska, which is notable for its high concentration of heavy rare earth elements. Ucore is also advancing its proprietary RapidSX technology, designed to provide a more efficient and environmentally friendly method for separating REEs compared to traditional solvent extraction. Through its Strategic Metals Complexes, Ucore aims to establish a sustainable North American supply chain for critical metals essential to modern technology and green energy sectors.
